Mixed martial arts events
Road Fighting Championship
Information
First dateFebruary 25, 2023
Last dateDecember 16, 2023
Events
Total events5
Fights
Chronology
2022 in Road FC Road Fighting Championship 2024 in Road FC

The year 2023 is the 14th year in the history of the Road Fighting Championship, a mixed martial arts promotion based in South Korea. 2023 starts with ROAD FC 63. [1]

List of events

[edit]
List of events in 2023
# Event title Main event Date Arena Location
1 ROAD FC 63 Hwang vs. Myung February 25, 2023 Goyang Gymnasium Goyang, South Korea
2 ROAD FC 64 Kim vs. Indenko June 24, 2023 Wonju Gymnasium Wonju, South Korea
3 ROAD FC 65 Kim vs. Azevedo August 26, 2023 Anyang Gymnasium Anyang, South Korea
4 ROAD FC 66 Kim vs. Haraguchi October 29, 2023 Chiak Gymnasium Wonju, South Korea
5 ROAD FC 67 Heo vs. Sekino December 16, 2023 Swiss Grand Hotel Seoul, South Korea

2023 Grands Prix

[edit]

Road FC President Jung Mun-hong recently revealed that the promotion will run Grand Prix across lightweight (70kg) and bantamweight (63kg) classes, The quarter-finals start on June 24 at Road FC 64, the semi-finals will take place in August and the finals in October. The winning prize is expected to be between 100 million South Korean won and 300 million South Korean won.[2]

Road FC 63

[edit]
Road FC 63
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateFebruary 25, 2023
VenueGoyang Gymnasium
City Goyang, South Korea

Road FC 63 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on February 25, 2023, at the Goyang Gymnasium in Goyang, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

An openweight kickboxing bout between Hwang In-su and Myung Hyun-man was booked as the event headliner.[5]

Results

[edit]
Road FC 63
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Openweight Hwang In-su def. Myung Hyun-man TKO (Retirement) 3 0:48 Kickboxing rules
Bantamweight 63 kg Yang Ji-yong def. Koki Hirasawa KO (Punch) 1 1:47
Openweight Shim Gun-oh def. Tserendash Azjargal Disqualification (Groin Kick) 2 0:12
Lightweight 70 kg Wi Jeong-won def. Lee Jae-won TKO (Retirement) 1 5:00
Heavyweight 120 kg Taisei Sekino def. Bae Dong-hyun TKO (Punches) 1 4:11
Part 1
Middleweight 84 kg Lim Dong-hwan def. Jung Ho-yeon TKO (Punches) 1 2:28
Middleweight 84 kg Jung Seung-ho def. Ko Kyung-jin TKO (Punches) 1 2:53
Bantamweight 63 kg Hong Tae-sun def. Han Ji-hoon Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 2 2:51
Bantamweight 63 kg Lee Jung-hyun def. Jang Jin-pyo Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Bantamweight 63 kg Kim Jun-seok def. Cha Min-hyuk Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00

Road FC 64

[edit]
Road FC 64
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateJune 24, 2023
VenueWonju Gymnasium
City Wonju, South Korea

Road FC 64 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on June 24, 2023, at the Wonju Gymnasium in Wonju, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A quarter-final bout for 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix between former ONE Bantamweight World Champion Kim Soo-chul and Alexey Indenko was booked as the event headliner.[6]

Fight card

[edit]
Road FC 64
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight 63 kg Kim Soo-chul def. Alexey Indenko Submission (Guillotine Choke) 1 0:55 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Bantamweight 63 kg Akira Haraguchi def. Moon Je-hoon Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Lightweight 70 kg Nandin Erdene def. Filipe Jesus TKO (Punches) 1 1:43 2023 Road FC Lightweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Bantamweight 63 kg Radzhab Shaydullaev def. Yang Ji-yong Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 4:00 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Lightweight 70 kg Shutaro Debano def. Park Hae-jin Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 2023 Road FC Lightweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout

Bantamweight 63 kg Bruno Azevedo def. Park Hyung-geun Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 3 1:28 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Part 1
Lightweight 70 kg Max Sugimoto def. Han Sang-kwon Disqualification (Illegal Knee) 1 2:58 2023 Road FC Lightweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final bout
Bantamweight 63 kg Baatarchuluun Gantogtokh def. Cha Min-hyuk KO (Punch) 1 3:42 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix Quarter-Final Reserve bout

Lightweight 70 kg Kim Min-hyung def. Park Hyeon-bin Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 3:22

Road FC 65
Information

City Anyang, South Korea

Road FC 65 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on August 26, 2023, at the Anyang Gymnasium in Anyang, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A semi-final bout for 2023 Road FC Bantamweight Grand Prix between former ONE Bantamweight World Champion Kim Soo-chul and Bruno Azevedo was booked as the event headliner.[7]

Fight card

[edit]

Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
